faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: Flatbush residents most commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally brown recluse or black widow spiders. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all spider species found in Brooklyn, using targeted treatments based on the specific type of infestation.

faqs.answer: Our spider control services in Flatbush range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Flatbush residents. Our team understands that spider infestations can be distressing, especially if dangerous species are present, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout Brooklyn.
